title: Ord Tessebok

'''Ord Tessebok''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated in the [[Irishi sector/Legends|Irishi sector]]. Serving as a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later it loosened its immigration restrictions for people displaced by the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Eventually the planet became a part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
Ord Tessebok was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Ord Tessebok system/Legends|Ord Tessebok system]], a part of the [[Irishi sector/Legends|Irishi sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which linked it to the [[Gonmore system/Legends|Gonmore]] and [[Vvan system]]s.<ref name="EGTW" />

==History==
[[File:Great_Northern_Crusade.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Ord Tessebok was a Galactic Republic outpost during the Great Northern Crusade in 11,884 BBY.]]
Ord Tessebok served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between approximately [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]]. It lay outside the borders of the Republic and in fact was located within what was at the time considered [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. The planet was eventually situated in the area where the Republic waged the [[Great Northern Crusade]] against various local [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] in [[11,884 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

Around [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3]], the [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Resettlement Coalition]], a group of planets willing to resettle on their surface [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] citizens displaced by the then-ongoing [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], was formed. Ord Tessebok became a member of the coalition and eventually was one of the group's ten Mid Rim worlds to loosen their immigration restrictions for said people, a fact that was noted in the 13:4:18 issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HNN" /> Ord Tessebok fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Inhabitants==
According to official census records,<ref name="HNN" /> in 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|regional/13418_1.html|Mid Rim Worlds Open Ports to Refugees}} is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:4:18," which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Ord Tessebok's population numbered 2.5 billion.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Tessebok was introduced in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #52]], an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|representation]] of the [[in-universe]] HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> that was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published by [[April 18]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN52 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Tessebok [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-6.<ref name="TEA" />
